transcript: Yeah, could I talk to your husband?
Uhh, I think... I think he just spoke to my boy a few minutes ago. Just need to talk to him. [exhales]
I think he just spoke to my son on the... on the phone a few moments ago, ma'am.
Well, if somebody... if he's talking about a seafood package, a C.O.D., it doesn't belong to us.

And he wasn't rude to your son, 'cause I was lying on the couch listening to him. He just said, "Bring it on by and we'll look at it." We're not coming out of our home... for something that's not coming to us.
I think you guys need to re-evaluate where you're coming from.
I think that I will call the police if you continue to harass me, because I don't understand why you're bothering me. We've done nothing.
It's a C.O.D., eight hundred and forty-two dollars.
I don't have a C.O.D. coming to me, sir. Nothing. And your son told me twenty-five dollars. So... I don't know where he...
It's a ninety-six hundred gallon tank of squid, from...
We did not order any ninety-six hundred dollar tank of squid, thank you. Have a nice day.
Yeah, this is Bernard over at United Parcel. What, uh... what seems to be the trouble here?
I think that you need to re-evaluate you guys' position.
I think you need to come over here so I can kick your ass!
This is a nine hundred and twenty dollar C.O.D. delivery.
Good. You bring it on over here.
Oh, we'll be there in ten to fifteen minutes.
That's a good idea. You bring it on over here and I'll have the cops here to meet you.
We need certified funds today. As well.
This is Curtis at UPS calling.
Okay, look, you know, we went through...
...this before with you guys. And I'm not...
...or somebody from UPS. I didn't order anything, you've got the wrong number.
Mmm... no, it's got yesterday's date on it.
I didn't order anything from UPS.
Well, we're on our way. And it's two tw... uh, two-two-seven. Two-hundred and twenty seven is... is due on the shipment.

No, I did not order it and I'm gonna have... if you don't give me a number or... your last name, or who you work for, I'm calling the police and having them file... a report filed. I went through this before with you people, I'm not playing this game a second time.
[sighs] I do have... I do see a flag here on your account, meaning that, uh, you have been problematic. I...
Gimme your last name. Don't make me call the police and have this phone traced. I will put a tap on it. I played this game once before. I am not in the mood for it today.
Lady, come and get me. Wh--
Listen to me, sir. Gimme your fuckin' last name.
It's 1800-PICKUPS. You've probably seen it a thousand times.
Right. Bullshit. You know why? Because I called that number and it's not r... it's not real. Gimme your real number.
No, I've called that. I've called that, it doesn't work. I don't believe you.
We're on our way, and we.. we need about twenty minutes, but we need a check for two... twenty-seven...

Not gonna get it. I don't believe you. I did not order anything. You are calling the wrong house, you're calling the wrong number. It's a different house, different number. If you call me again, or if you come by my home, I will have the police arrive.
We'll be there in fifteen minutes.
Fine, I'll have the police here waiting for you.
We'll have a four hundred and sixteen pound squid that's in a tank...
I've already dealt with this squid shit before with you people, do not start it again! I will call the police and have this done.

I will have this done. I don't care if you gave me a false name, I will use it. I'll have them tap my phone. I'm not in the mood for this game. Okay? I have too much goin' on in my life to fuckin' play games. Don't be playin' this game again, do not call this number again.
Uh, ma'am, that's... yeah, that's it, we've got flags on your account now.
Do not call this number again!
We're signifying you as a problem customer.
Do not call this account again!
Yes, this is Bernard at United Parcel.
Okay, you have been flagged as problematic.
Drop fuckin' dead! Why don't you come over here and talk to me?
Well, we'll be there in fifteen minutes.
